economic_notes: First Nation holds 40% interest in Ironhorse Fleet Management Limited Partnership (automotive fleet management). Member of Saskatoon Tribal Council (STC). Holds 14.3% interest in STC Casino Holdings Corporation, STC Casino Holdings Limited Partnership, STC Investments Ltd., and STC Investments Limited Partnership. TLE Trust has purchased 6,650 acres of land. New gas bar building under construction with $5,600,000 approved loan. Solar project with $687,000 available credit. Construction projects in progress with carrying value of $12,820,891.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Consolidated entities include: General/Health/Revenue Fund, Muskoday Store and Gas Bar, TLE Trust, Crossing Island Holdings Inc., Muskoday Economic Development Limited, Muskoday Economic Development Authority Limited Partnership, and Muskoday First Nation Fire Department. No GBEs under modified equity method currently. First Nation is not in compliance with long-term debt covenant requiring financial statements within 150 days of year end. New PS 3280 (asset retirement obligations) and PS 3450 (financial instruments) standards adopted April 1, 2022 prospectively. Restricted cash includes capital projects ($7,860,538) and Trust accounts ($209,105). Restricted investments - TLE Trust ($4,243,392). CFS Demo internally restricted surplus of $2,831,365. Defined contribution pension plan with $357,751 contributed in 2023.
